# Tech Stack Overview (EN)

This file contains the core technologies utilized in this project.

## Languages and Technologies
- **TypeScript:** Type-safe and scalable web applications.
- **Rust:** High-performance systems and WASM modules.
- **Go:** Fast and efficient cloud-native backend services.
- **Swift:** iOS and system-level development.
- **Python:** Data analysis and AI integrations.
- **Java/Kotlin:** Enterprise and mobile solutions.
- **Elixir/Ruby:** Distributed systems and rapid prototyping.
- **Haskell:** Functional excellence.
